backend/main.mo: Defines Motoko actor with types for appointments, clients, repetitions, statistics, reports, and related data structures used across the backend.
feature_evidence.json: Lists feature evidence mapping feature IDs to related frontend files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Provides prewritten summaries of multiple frontend files describing their responsibilities and recent feature updates.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up routing, authentication handling, profile setup flow, and renders the main app layout with theme support.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentActio: Dialog allowing users to choose edit or delete actions for an appointment, opening corresponding subdialogs.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentDelet: Alert dialog for deleting an appointment with options for single or future-deletions and backend mutation handling.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentDialo: Dialog for creating or editing appointments, managing form state, client selection, validation, and submission via hooks.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentEditM: Empty file with no implemented content.
Displays sorted appointments with payment status and details, and opens an action dialog for selected items.
frontend/src/components/ClientPhotoField: Handles selecting, validating, cropping, previewing, and removing a client photo before saving.
frontend/src/components/FinancialOvervie: Shows three financial summary cards for monthly paid revenue, remaining dues, and completed appointments.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer showing attribution with a link and icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Top navigation bar with authentication controls, navigation buttons, and a new-appointment trigger.
frontend/src/components/MonthlyListingTa: Renders a detailed monthly listing table with computed totals for revenues, payments, and credits.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal that collects a user's name and saves their profile via a mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity and refreshes dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides authentication context using Internet Identity, handling identity loading, login, and logout.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for user profiles, client records, appointments, and related CRUD operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles and custom theme variables plus layout helpers for the ComptaMois table.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the app with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/AgendaPage.tsx: Empty page placeholder for agenda functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDatabasePage.ts: UI for viewing, creating, editing, deleting, and exporting client records with validation and sorting.
frontend/src/pages/ComptaMoisPage.tsx: Monthly accounting view showing appointments, financial stats, and actions to update payment or status.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard fetching monthly listings and appointments to compute revenue, dues, and credits, and render financial overview and tables with month navigation.
frontend/src/pages/ListingMensuelPage.ts: Empty file placeholder for monthly listing page.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login screen using Internet Identity with a marketing-style feature overview and login button.
frontend/src/pages/RapportPDFPage.tsx: Generates PDF reports (weekly, monthly, annual), fetching listings and computing revenues and totals with monthly listing formulas.
frontend/src/pages/SemainePage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for weekly page.
frontend/src/utils/bigintMath.ts: Utility functions for bigint math including abs, clamp, sum, and min/max helpers.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: CSV export helpers to escape fields, convert arrays to CSV, and trigger file downloads.
frontend/src/utils/imageCrop.ts: Crops and resizes images to a 35x45 aspect ratio and converts photos to displayable URLs.
frontend/src/utils/monthlyListing.ts: Shared revenue and credit calculation utilities for monthly listings using consistent formulas.
frontend/src/utils/timeRange.ts: Utilities for bigint timestamp handling including month boundaries and time checks.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities to read, persist, and clear URL parameters and session-stored values, with support for hash-based routing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind CSS theme extensions, colors, animations, and plugins including typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Defines project metadata, current issues, and feature requirements for restoring existing-client selection in the appointment creation flow.
